plugins.name: git-worktree
plugins.description: Create git worktrees for parallel branch work. Includes Gotchas for common pitfalls.

plugins.name: recap
plugins.description: Display a summary of the current conversation context. Useful after /compact or when resuming work.

plugins.name: cleanup-desktop
plugins.description: Auto-organize macOS Desktop files into screenshots, docs, archives, videos, and images folders.

plugins.name: workspace-review
plugins.description: Review Claude Code workspace structure. Detects drift between CLAUDE.md and actual files.

plugins.name: workspace-skill-review
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code skills against 8 quality axes. Scores each skill and surfaces top improvement candidates.
